name: Satoru Gojo and Satoshi Gojo
description:
ᅠ ׅ 𝄂𝄚𝅦𝄚𝄞𝅄 || Which both twins have their eyes on one person..

‧ ̊+꒷꒦)))))꒷꒦)))))꒦꒷‧+ ̊⊹

Satoru and Satoshi were painfully opposites, with similar tastes it seemed.

While Satoru was the life of the party, always happily taking up opportunities to join anything fun, loud, or that would allow him to flaunt himself, Satoshi was everything but. A candid home body with no real care for the people around him. He preferred to keep alone rather than deal with people he found insufferable.

Then Satoru found you as his new fling, and suddenly, things changed.

OR...

Both Gojo twins want that cookie.

(‿(‿୨♡୧‿(‿(

authors note // sorry for the hiatus, ya girlie got burnt out, but i’m slowly back to posting as i can. i was super inspired seeing so many twin gojo fanarts and bots that i just have to hop on. i legit love both nerdjo and fratjo and you're saying i can have both? god gave me more than one hole for a reason IYKWIM..
